title: BEM-542.4 practical orchestrator E2E
objective:
Run script:
"""
base = Path('governance/internal_contour/tests/bem542')
base.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
reports = Path('governance/reports')
proofs = Path('governance/codex/proofs')
transport = Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
role_state_path = Path('governance/state/role_cycle_state.json')
cycle = 'bem542-practical-e2e'

# Start with a single external curator input. Everything else must be driven by orchestrator decisions.
initial = {
  'record_type':'curator_intake',
  'cycle_id':cycle,
  'trace_id':'bem542_practical_e2e_001',
  'source':'gpt',
  'task_type':'development',
  'title':'Practical orchestrator E2E artifact',
  'objective':'Create artifact only after orchestrator routes through analyst, auditor, executor and final closure.',
  'status':'completed',
  'artifact_path':'governance/internal_contour/tests/bem542/practical_input.json',
  'blocker':None,
  'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 14:16 (UTC+3)'
}
(base/'practical_input.json').write_text(json.dumps(initial, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
with transport.open('a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write(json.dumps(initial, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

# Load cycle records and repeatedly route based on latest record, not a pre-written hardcoded role table.
def cycle_records():
    out=[]
    for line in transport.read_text(errors='ignore').splitlines():
        if not line.strip():
            continue
        try:
            r=json.loads(line)
        except Exception:
            continue
        if r.get('cycle_id')==cycle:
            out.append(r)
    return out

def decide(latest):
    rt = latest.get('record_type')
    if rt == 'curator_intake':
        if latest.get('task_type') == 'development':
            return ('analyst','development_requires_analysis')
        if latest.get('task_type') == 'audit':
            return ('auditor','audit_task')
        return ('curator','unknown_task_type')
    if rt == 'analysis' and latest.get('status') == 'completed':
        return ('auditor','analysis_completed')
    if rt == 'audit' and latest.get('decision') == 'PASS_TO_EXECUTOR':
        return ('executor','audit_pass_to_executor')
    if rt == 'execution' and latest.get('status') == 'completed':
        return ('auditor_final','execution_requires_final_audit')
    if rt == 'audit' and latest.get('decision') == 'FINAL_PASS':
        return ('curator_closure','final_audit_pass')
    return ('curator','default')

def append_record(rec):
    with transport.open('a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        f.write(json.dumps(rec, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

steps = []
closed = False
for i in range(1, 10):
    records = cycle_records()
    latest = records[-1]
    next_role, reason = decide(latest)
    decision = {
      'record_type':'role_orchestrator_decision',
      'cycle_id':cycle,
      'source':'internal_orchestrator',
      'from_role':'role_orchestrator',
      'to_role':next_role,
      'status':'completed',
      'decision':'route_to_' + next_role,
      'reason':reason,
      'input_record_type':latest.get('record_type'),
      'artifact_path':'governance/internal_contour/tests/bem542/practical_orchestrator_decision_' + str(i) + '.json',
      'commit_sha':None,
      'blocker':None,
      'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 14:16 (UTC+3)'
    }
    (base/('practical_orchestrator_decision_' + str(i) + '.json')).write_text(json.dumps(decision, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
    append_record(decision)
    steps.append({'step':i,'decision':next_role,'reason':reason})
    if next_role == 'analyst':
        p = base/'practical_analyst_plan.md'
        p.write_text('# BEM-542 Practical Analyst Plan\n\nGenerated because orchestrator routed development intake to analyst.\n')
        append_record({'record_type':'analysis','cycle_id':cycle,'source':'internal','from_role':'analyst','to_role':'role_orchestrator','status':'completed','artifact_path':str(p),'commit_sha':None,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 14:16 (UTC+3)'})
    elif next_role == 'auditor':
        p = base/'practical_auditor_review.md'
        p.write_text('# BEM-542 Practical Auditor Review\n\nPASS_TO_EXECUTOR because analyst plan exists.\n')
        append_record({'record_type':'audit','cycle_id':cycle,'source':'internal','from_role':'auditor','to_role':'role_orchestrator','status':'completed','decision':'PASS_TO_EXECUTOR','artifact_path':str(p),'commit_sha':None,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 14:16 (UTC+3)'})
    elif next_role == 'executor':
        p = base/'practical_executor_artifact.md'
        p.write_text('# BEM-542 Practical Executor Artifact\n\nCreated only after orchestrator routed audit PASS_TO_EXECUTOR to executor.\n')
        append_record({'record_type':'execution','cycle_id':cycle,'source':'internal','from_role':'executor','to_role':'role_orchestrator','status':'completed','artifact_path':str(p),'commit_sha':None,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 14:16 (UTC+3)'})
    elif next_role == 'auditor_final':
        p = base/'practical_final_audit.md'
        p.write_text('# BEM-542 Practical Final Audit\n\nFINAL_PASS because executor artifact exists.\n')
        append_record({'record_type':'audit','cycle_id':cycle,'source':'internal','from_role':'auditor','to_role':'role_orchestrator','status':'completed','decision':'FINAL_PASS','artifact_path':str(p),'commit_sha':None,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 14:16 (UTC+3)'})
    elif next_role == 'curator_closure':
        p = base/'practical_curator_closure.md'
        p.write_text('# BEM-542 Practical Curator Closure\n\nCycle closed after orchestrator saw FINAL_PASS.\n')
        append_record({'record_type':'final_result','cycle_id':cycle,'source':'internal','from_role':'curator','to_role':'external_gpt','status':'completed','artifact_path':str(p),'commit_sha':None,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 14:16 (UTC+3)'})
        closed = True
        break
    else:
        break

ok = closed and [s['decision'] for s in steps] == ['analyst','auditor','executor','auditor_final','curator_closure']
state = json.loads(role_state_path.read_text()) if role_state_path.exists() else {}
state['cycle_id'] = cycle
state['updated_at'] = '2026-05-17 | 14:16 (UTC+3)'
state['curator_status'] = 'CLOSED' if ok else 'BLOCKED'
state['active_role'] = 'curator'
state['next_role'] = None
state['current_task'] = {'id':'BEM-542.4','title':'Practical orchestrator E2E','status':'completed' if ok else 'blocked'}
state['blocker'] = None if ok else {'code':'PRACTICAL_ORCHESTRATOR_E2E_FAILED','steps':steps,'closed':closed}
hist = state.get('history', [])
if not isinstance(hist, list): hist = [hist]
hist.append({'at':'2026-05-17 | 14:16 (UTC+3)','event':'BEM-542.4 practical orchestrator E2E','status':'PASS' if ok else 'BLOCKER','steps':steps})
state['history'] = hist
role_state_path.write_text(json.dumps(state, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

report = reports/'bem542_4_practical_orchestrator_e2e.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-542.4 | Practical Orchestrator E2E | ' + ('PASS' if ok else 'BLOCKER') + '\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 14:16 (UTC+3)\n\n## Что проверено\nОркестратор не получил готовую цепочку ролей. Он на каждом шаге читал latest transport record и сам выбирал следующую роль.\n\n## Decisions\n```json\n' + json.dumps(steps, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + '\n```\n\n## Expected sequence\nanalyst -> auditor -> executor -> auditor_final -> curator_closure\n\n## Actual sequence\n' + ' -> '.join([s['decision'] for s in steps]) + '\n\n## Blocker\n' + ('null' if ok else json.dumps(state['blocker'], ensure_ascii=False)) + '\n')
proof = proofs/'bem542_4_practical_orchestrator_e2e.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-542.4 ' + ('PASS' if ok else 'BLOCKER') + ': practical orchestrator E2E sequence=' + '->'.join([s['decision'] for s in steps]) + '\n')

changed = [str(transport), str(role_state_path), str(report), str(proof), str(base/'practical_input.json')]
for p in base.iterdir():
    if p.name.startswith('practical_'):
        changed.append(str(p))
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('BEM-542.4 practical orchestrator E2E completed')
"""
No issue comments.
